//notes: modelled after size SAPI M, with base coat
the thickness of the base coat itself doesn't appear to be available online, so we presume 40 mil

name.str: AR steel medium plate, NIJ III
name.str_pl: AR steel medium plates, NIJ III

description: A SAPI-cut ballistic plate with a single-curve profile, made of AR500 steel by Armored Republic.  On the outward-facing side the manufacturer's logo is proudly displayed.  This plate is rated for NIJ III, which means it's been tested to survive at least 3 rounds of high-energy rifle rounds.  Plates like this one are intended to be inserted into a plate carrier where it will absorb the energy of multiple rifle rounds before requiring replacement.  This model is sized "medium" and can only fit in carriers that allow medium-sized plates.
//material: rubber stands in for anti-spalling cover, which is a polyurea
